race.comment: TURBULENT (11) was a barnstorming winner here fresh. Has left himself with too much to do in his last two but has been closing nicely late. Comes through a hot race at Dubbo, worth following that formline. APACHE JACK (8) caught the eye fresh then got the job done last time when racing closer. Peaks on the quick back-up and can make it two on the bounce. MRS BULL (7) was below her best last time but does boast good peaks. Backs up quickly and it's worth noting Weir reuniting. Leading player this time. EXTREME MERGER (12) was a dominant winner two back when leading pillar-to-post. Less effective last time when ridden quieter. Gets in well with the 2kg claim and finds a nice race for him. Can bounce back sharply.
